README: Queue of verified jackpot events for the weekly content engine. Add an item with processed:false and the Monday GitHub Action will draft an article from it and open a pull request for review. Only add facts you have verified from provider announcements or reputable public records — the generator is forbidden from inventing specifics. The example below is already marked processed and will never publish.

items.sourceNotes: Announced by Games Global (provider press release, June 2025). First eight-figure Mega Moolah payout in recent months, won on the original Mega Moolah title. Games Global CPO Andy Booth and Betfred Head of Gaming Andrew Horne both gave statements; Games Global has awarded over EUR 130 million in jackpot prizes across its network. Exact amount per Betfred: GBP 11,498,211.89.
EXAMPLE ITEM (already covered on the site). Guinness World Record online slot payout, announced by Microgaming, April 2021.
